[{"Name":"Ray Worrall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJNrDRhkW0wWyuMh_R1hm60FgpNOmn9Sw0gx8M1fnl15pVcOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been wanting to get a snow fence or guard installed for a few years now as I was tired of the snow falling off the roof.  In our area came across an install by Canuck Roofing.  Phoned them and receive an estimate which I was happy with and proceeded to have the snow guard installed.  Work done was very professional and cost effective.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBdAkcoGR4K1J_Ky257wx27&fid=0x0:0xd33de2d70a59d9b2"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"Shara Nixon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXaw-oZTlaa9lJ-_Pmt3GdYryVz4wztOQ4kiFD4cqnjQRzr-TNx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a Strata Property Manager I work with a lot of different roofing contractors but I can honestly say that my experience with Canuck Roofing was the best.  I was not present during the installation of the new roof but when there were issues after the installation, they were quick to come and deal with it.  They honoured their warranty without any run around.  They were excellent communicators and very good to work with.  I will use them again in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robby V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsYfdjmXmS8OQe1eHE88erhqf3c4Taot6IM0bkrRdN-24mCw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After getting quotes from four different companies, we decided to go with Canuck Roofing.  Our decision was based on the positive Google reviews, The Best of Burnaby Awards, A+ BBB rating, and competitive price.  Our first point of contact was with Garrett.  He provided a thorough walk through and explained the scope of work required.  By the end of the day, I had a copy of a very detailed quote that included the scope of work to be done, including all the details of the type of shingles to be applied, vents, flashing, finishes, warranty, etc…

The start of the job was delayed by a few weeks due to rain.  The crew arrived at 7am on the day the job started.  They laid out tarps around the perimeter of the property to protect the plants and walkway.  By noon, the entire roof had been stripped off and they started applying new plywood.  There was a threat of rain that evening so they knew they had to have the roof waterproofed before they left that day.  The crew was fast and efficient and put in a long 12 hour day.  They made sure to leave the yard clean and free of debris before they left for the day.

On Day 2 we met with Arnell and project manager Franscisco.  They went over the progress and addressed any concerns that we had.  As a contractor myself, I was very impressed with the quality of work and attention to detail that the crew took.  Every row of shingles were perfectly straight and they chalk lined all the valleys and cap shingles.  They even installed rain diverters at all the edges to direct the rain towards the gutters.  They took the extra step of respraying the furnace vent and chimney flashing.  You could tell the crew took pride in their work.

After everything was completed on the roof, the crew cleaned the entire perimeter of the house.  They blew out all the gutters and picked up every last bit of debris from the flower beds.  Before they left, they used a magnet roller to pickup any nails from the driveway.  I cannot say enough about the professionalism of the crew and the quality of their work.  The project manager Franscisco came by to do a final walkthrough to ensure that everything was completed, and to our satisfaction, before accepting our final payment.  If you need your roof redone, I highly recommend Canuck Roofing.  Excellent job!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAcUdcd3VMLfhSRMQkE47ZP&fid=0x0:0xd33de2d70a59d9b2"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Min-Jee Mowat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8uCA1U3usW8xUu0mhvaDVOx-f71LysE8W5-YPMoH6nVtUsw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was able to communicate and dispatch a crew to us within less than an hour of finding a huge hole in our roof. The shingles had been torn open exposing the framework of our house to the rain and snow. Matthew was on site, very friendly and thorough with his explanations of what had most likely happened to our roof. The repair jobs and the next steps regarding repair were also conveyed to us (we'll have to wait until the weather clears up to complete the job) Very thankful for the speedy communication and patch job to put our mind at ease!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDlI2J3NgTuug-IHGS7Vsvu&fid=0x0:0xd33de2d70a59d9b2"],"When":"2026-1-8"},{"Name":"Daniel Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIPdWxGrpN5gWGDg9QhOVG3e2U5B-Exf6SwJ66-BSSAnfC53g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Scottie and his team at Canuck Roofing were fantastic in dealing with some roof damage I had incurred during a recent windstorm.  It was a bit of a nightmare trying to get roofing companies to quickly assess the work and provide a quote with some taking more than a week to get back to me with some kind of estimate and others simply not responding at all.  Scottie on the other had was extremely quick to respond, assessed the work based on the photos I had, and give me a quote on the spot and even though it was considered a pretty small job, scheduled the work for that week.  The work was completed flawlessly and the guys on the work crew were even up front about the shingles potentially not matching despite their best efforts to procure the best match.  In the end the match was almost perfect.  My only regret through this whole experience was not contacting them first.  I would definitely recommend Scottie and his team for their friendliness, professionalism, and quick turnaround.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Colin Lancaster","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVeQbh8jaTlnPREhz9lpOiK2q_KdzDoHY2h7N5v-eREMXRX4O0Q-w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Canuck Roofing replaced our cedar shingle roof with an asphalt IKO shingle roof. From start to finish this was a fantastic experience. Cam, the sales representative, was extremely knowledgeable, friendly and the estimate provided was very thorough. The workers, with Joey leading the crew, completed the roof replacement in under 1 day with minimal fuss. They were friendly, efficient and very hard-working. Two days later, the project manager, Fransisco, attended site and walked me through the key things he was inspecting. The roof looks great and we couldn't be happier. Great company. Highly recommend!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sergio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKEKFEO5OMKta1ZWVu06GEYZ3aHzEFUt79XTyvWKEgoMgfNXA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After contacting several roofing companies for quotes to re-roof a large scale residential roof, Canuck was the chosen bid.
They were hired based on a competitive quote, 👍 reviews and good communications with estimator Garret Tanner.

The project started on schedule with concise progress reports provided throughout the process by site manager Franco Difede.

From disposal of the old roof to install of the new torch on, the crew did a 👍 job. (highly skilled) The project was finished with Bert’s great metalwork.

In short, Canuck was an excellent choice, a well organized team that excelled with all aspects of the project. I gotta go with an A+ rating across the board.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAmukkROEPYzAZKRibunq2L&fid=0x0:0xd33de2d70a59d9b2"],"When":"2025-7-31"},{"Name":"Derek Lau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzB-HW-AF0QlbCnsPlhRvZLVH6lE5-nxGYED_IKNjMZnRRe1WV=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had poor experiences dealing with other roofing companies when dealing with leaks so I was careful in my research to find a company that would be fair on pricing and do it right.  My search led me to Canuck roofing, and from the initial contact to final inspection, they’ve been solid and professional.  I learned the hard way why my previous roof leaked and it was great to see them not cut any corners, and take care to get the details right.  Lots of photos to show progress and the completed work.  The experienced crew always showed up on time and took care to not damage anything and tidied up after each day.  They answered all of my questions and followed up after the project to ensure everything was satisfactory. I have confidence that everything was done right and can happily recommend Canuck roofing!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENyevuyguICOQQ&fid=0x0:0xd33de2d70a59d9b2"],"When":"2025-5-7"}]

[{"Name":"Joe Yeung Wai Chui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_KRunk9AiLiL1s3eFVboH0veN8HcPHzhwWlZLgx_zthUfDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was approached by Griffin as a walk by a few months back, I’ve been thinking of updating my roof around the time, so it was perfect opportunity to get a quote from him, in turn he was very knowledgeable and up front, no hidden cost, plus he can guide u to a finance company with low interest if u can’t pay it all at once (we end up didn’t need it, but it was a good option to have)

We scheduled a date, but when it got close the weather wasn’t very stable he was willing to rescheduled to tend to my concern, which I was very appreciated and finally when May comes weather seen to be mush better and we are ready! But he had to push us back a couple of days, which in turn I totally understood.
Anyway, the big dumpster got dropped off, the guy was very nice and gentle that he put wood plank underneath it so it wouldn’t mark my driveway, and the undoing of my old roof began!!! The guys was very efficient and careful, they even got the water barrier down the first day, second day was a little slow, but they did manage to get more than half done and most of the vents changed, third day was finishing up the shingles and clean up most of the big debris around the house.
On the fourth day it was the new gutters, they did take some time, but it was done just as the sun went down(without the down pipes)
Finally on the fifth day, all the down pipes are connected a little touch up here and there, with the garbage bin hauled away and Griffin did a walk around on the roof with me!

My final thoughts, their installation was very nice, all the flashing and end piece was well placed, exposed nails(for the vents) was sealed with sealer/silicone, my only little little feed back to Griffin was about the final clean up(because that was the sales pitch that got me to go with him) might need a little bit effort, but all in all I am very happy","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKn7yO-f2qyizgE&fid=0x0:0xe96df3497cf8748c"],"When":"2025-5-11"},{"Name":"Amandah Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7vj6hIs1gDSgBT53rsY2onXYmJBGVm8ShVulIHTRFAWWJkF8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rydel did an incredible job putting the Christmas light on our house! It looks simply magical and my kids love running out to look at the light every night. We are very grateful!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDOjacuH-NnYT39QyOej2J1&fid=0x0:0xe96df3497cf8748c"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Susan Allen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7-QAXc0WAz8Ox27ga_XQJEE8L9NIqYfk4k9V49TqAGNINuaCK=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From start to finish we were very happy with the service from the Rydel team. Gabriel worked to help us get the roof on within our budget and Griffin got the team here very quickly to get started. Great communication through the whole project.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bernie Hadley-Beauregard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpxmsYqz3VqQWDSnyBN22EmWRLtHmu9SKfqJ6KWImRYyOL1IE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had an outstanding re-roofing experience with Rydel Roofing. Their pricing was also extremely competitive, making the entire experience top-notch from start to finish.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Betty I","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJj7qRC9V-dg98peGwA-llMwyj9U8EdWPE7800bX2gK041nkw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We contacted Rydel Roofing to repair our 30+ year old roof and are very happy that we did!  It was a very smooth process from start to finish.  We appreciate the thorough attention to detail & great communication provided by Griffin from the initial roof inspection to the final cleanup.  He was professional, knowledgeable & courteous and responded quickly to our emails and answered all questions & concerns we had.

Griffin took the time to show us the options for repairing vs. replacing our roof.  The detailed inspection report with photos identifying the condition of our roof was extremely helpful and the quote was transparent with a very competitive price. We decided to go with the repair and was not disappointed.

The work was completed within 2 days and included all recommended repairs, preventative maintenance & cleaning.  The final inspection report contained a summary with a set of photos clearly showing the work completed.

We appreciate the high-quality work and respectful & supportive communication we received and would not hesitate to recommend Rydel Roofing to others for all their roofing needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul Champagne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLNRdmPY1BClQSVXqbwVVrRYxMQBXAboUoSnksO357vRnfLVw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible experience from start  to finish!! Only thing Griffin was ok but his work crew were Horrible....","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Liam Golding","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNn9UPyvODGjrNsxJVSvvCijwAMI2HkJq27JVxrWx_TZCyG0U=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Griffin is the man! [{"Name":"wayne young","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLH5WqHp1wiYM7Np5Px5ucuoyY1BKTgqUz8-yxHwbArOu8k=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I hired Ideal Siding for a complete siding replacement using James HardiePlank and HardieTrim, and the transformation is excellent. Throughout the entire process, it was clear that customer satisfaction was their primary goal.

I am very particular about details, and I was impressed by the team’s consistently great attitude. As with any major construction project, there were hiccups along the way, but what set this experience apart was how they handled them. Any criticism or concern I raised was met with an immediate focus on resolving the issue rather than making excuses.

Marcello was a pleasure to work with—he responded quickly to every message and truly listened to my concerns. My installer, Shawn, is a true master of his craft. He was open to my suggestions and worked hard to ensure we were completely happy with the results before the job was considered complete.

The only minor critique I have is that the crew is not as adept at the electrical or HVAC aspects that can overlap with siding work. However, when it comes to the siding itself, their professionalism and commitment to getting the details right were top-tier. I highly recommend them!"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lenny Goh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUME6IeJntIbIZwezkuaF9UtAx558Fk9jsZktP_5b_YNMAlC9wqpw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The entire experience from start to finish was fantastic. We are so happy with the finished product. We have a beautiful house that looks BRAND NEW and will be low maintenance for years to come.

If you are looking to replace your siding go Hardie and go with Ideal Siding. He is one of the most excellent workers I’ve ever come across. Diligent, hardworking, handy, positive, quick and knowledgeable. If you get him you too will be blown away.
After 30+ years I had a feeling that all was not very well underneath our cedar siding and once it was removed we saw that some of our base plate and studs were rotted from water damage. If you choose to use ideal siding make you get other quotes first. The price is fair especially in todays market, but paying extra for professionalism and peace of mind is so worth it, in comparison to the headache you will get working with Igor and Joe. I wish I didn’t have to leave this review… truly. The service I was provided was awful I have so many compliments (in emails too) that I’ll just list a few for the review. First off: the Hardie board and batten colour plus finish is awful. The darker colour)iron grey)  gets damaged from peeling the plastic off leaving blotchy marks all over the panels. They claimed the factory is having issues. In hindsight I feel it was stored incorrect by stacking and damaging the boards. Anyways they reordered more and it was a 2 weeks delay… ok then installation; the site was a horrible mess for 3 months. They left piles of silica dust from cutting the boards all over the lawn. Nails in the grass (still to this day), metal, boards, battens everywhere. I emailed multiple times for clean up reminders and to clean up in general with little to no acknowledgment. They did a horrible job laying out the battens (vertically) on 3 gables. Even after I emailed, 3 site visits, multiple calls about being sure the siding lay out would work. They then blamed the size of the wall on why it’s not even, and the window lay out. They replaced some horrible cut panels in many areas. This a single story symmetrical house these issues shouldn’t be happening… it’s all excuses. They had no clue how big the project actually was because they were short material and then wasted a lot after getting more delivered.  At the end I had to ask them to put dryer vents and other venting in and they said it was a custom product by haired trying to say it’s $250-$300 and weeks for shipping.. homedepot has them for $35 in stock 24/7. Joe made it seem like everything they were doing was a favour. When I’m laying 89K for a job I except that it’s a job not a favour…. And I’m paying these people salary. Over all I felt for the 89k that I spent with them they owe me 5K in the hours I spent PMing the job for them… it was such an embarrassment hiring this company to do this job for my clients. The caulking is such a mess still and horrible paint job touch ups. Overall it’s a 5.5 out of 10 for looks especially up close.. sure everyone says no one will notice when they stand back…. But that’s a horrible excuse. For 89K it should be stunning and it’s a shame that people are price gouging and giving the worst service and mediocre installations. I’m scared the uncaulked areas they mansplained me saying didn’t need to be caulked will leak and cause water intrusion. Lastly: Joe is very unorganized he doesn’t provide updated invoices and expects payment day of. He needs to understand how to invoice properly and allow people time to prepare large payments. I held back 10% from the final payment because I asked for them come back and do touch ups to the dreadful caulk job Harry and is team did… that was in October. Joe put little pieces of tape all over the deficiencies… then never came back the tape is still on (Jan 2023) I guess they lost my contact info in that time. I just prey that a vulnerable homeowner reads this review and takes my advice to choose another siding installer.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICBo8usxQE&fid=0x0:0x414f2b6bdf002e90"],"When":"2023-1-3"},{"Name":"Alina Merwin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbOwpw6Vway0Qzb-XAgEk9e8ycFeZcr68ZZlG9m4FDKikFbg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The guys from Ideal Siding did a great job on our satellite building project! We have another project coming up in several months and we will definitely use them for that project as well! I could not have been more pleased with their work and their commitment to a job well done!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrew Walker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWO71O-6vtxy0oWqlkgMTL_1fXX0zuePLUhWltL9zkToFe7FadaGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Ideal Siding. The house is only half done here as we are using another colour and siding style for the yellow.  But the Dark Blue and white windows frames they did looks great!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dar Jeeling","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-IorJj4Rbj6OjA3TwsEiimhHXdqhFl6nuzsfGNbrq_7YCZ6c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Joe Chang is an excellent project manager. The siding quote doesn't include permits for garbage bins (Joe helped us with finding a disposal contractor, saving us money!), and any other carpentry work will be extra. Our house had unforeseen issues with windows and foundation. Joe, Martin, and Harry did beautiful job on framing the windows and gutters. Recommend 👍","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ginger Toth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKruFjotiDc_r0xhE4tGjx7BZNvzBgOnDDe3i-0xo3_7Uhq-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If we could give Ideal siding 6 stars we would. [{"Name":"Doug Binns","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0qgpOscY0je4rM85jpvNT96sa45SwdGqjPtsz5ce4ARmvMlDV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am an average DIY person who is not afraid to tackle projects.  I

have done two projects requiring roofing materials recently:  1.  Flashing two 32" X 84" skylights and then roofing about a 5 foot by 15 foot roof around the skylights, and, 2. repairing facia at  my mother-in-law's place, including new flashing and drip edge.

1.  the roofing job

I looked at a couple other jobs, so had an idea what to do.

I visited your Burnaby location and walked in off the street to see if I could purchase the required materials and ask a couple questions. I previously tried two building supply stores and that was hopeless.

I met with a young man named Jaz.  Jaz was amazing.  He could tell, I think, that I had done a bit of handywork and talked to me on my level and treated me with respect while he explained what I needed to do to complete the project.  I bought all the materials and about 35% extra, just in case, because the job was in Pender Harbour where these materials are scarce.

Jazz walked me through the entire process and let me know what was most important.

I followed his instructions and the job turned out perfect.

2.  The facia and drip edge job

I visited SSR Surrey location - head office {my mother-in-law lives in Surrey} and met with Charles at the order desk.  He was equally as helpful as Jaz was as I worked through the materials that I would need, including having a custom drip edge made up over the weekend.  Everything was fantastic and customer service was top notch.

I highly recommend SSR for your roofing supplies and advice - but don't consider doing roofing unless you are handy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICMyNDBxwE&fid=0x0:0xeb81136fef2e0a1c"],"When":"2019-9-16"},{"Name":"Jag Nahal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2d130m9uV746BHb0D3iMn8bAe8hYzXGqbIQjGqPhPqh4dntw_=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best place to buy all kind roofing products","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Colin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsczsptntjY3JUOCViyaTaYburQvnZrp8O2gvYGkuJs2p98w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to go for all your roofing needs. Robin will help you with any questions.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDkqN2asQE&fid=0x0:0xeb81136fef2e0a1c"],"When":"2019-3-23"},{"Name":"Roman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLaj1QDdCfAelvduzyHqRqmSA6yKVrwGBvdwZ4QojO1b77jhg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Robin been great for almost a decade ive known him here","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elizebeth Tooley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJON0DnmTMEhb4Ov01RGlVogSoPinMp9OIQT7luW81sqYsJRw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Buy stocks in these guys! I was so impressed with their capacity to handle the load. I am a “small fish” homeowner customer and they treated me with respect, patience and thoughtfulness. In addition to managing their many contractors and commercial scale orders they always found the time to assist me with my (arguably) many queries. They never looked down on me for not being a full-time professional roofer and helped me think of the things I would likely forget. In getting to know their staff and particularly Robin, it felt like I was being looked out for by a family member. The team at SSR made sure I had thought of everything, triple checking my list with me. It made me think they would also be a great team to work with. They would handle so many things at once, gave honest advice, gave the input I hadn’t considered and were encouraging to boot along the way. With their sound advice, I won’t need to see them for a while with my roof completed, but I heartily send anyone their way!! And no I am not a bot or a staff member ! Thanks SSR! – Jen","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robby V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsYfdjmXmS8OQe1eHE88erhqf3c4Taot6IM0bkrRdN-24mCw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Needed custom flashing for my roofing project.  Great prices and excellent customer service.  They are busy so expect 4-5 day turnaround.  Recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"t willis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlefb_jtHTqXks194bsBTasnkX7bwhXMGaXmWdFB6eEODX-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great knowledgeable staff, inventory/pricing always on point.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"kim hirose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3TnvOQhvYd3ADd1_8gDJhle4zSu3GuUSwmFy7kcIiFgUH0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"l purchased some roof wash for the control of moss from SSR Roofing Supply and dealt with Robin. Really appreciate it.  lf l require further roofing products l will certainly consult Robin at SSR !","Images":null,"When":""}]

Called another company and had the work done within 3 days.  Called RooFix back to request that they delete my credit card information that I foolishly gave to them before the work was done, and request an e mail confirmation of said deletion.  So far.....Nothing.  The lack of response has been astounding.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Remy Druker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfxWOYkYUc3S5UeVv88S1EaZ3lwzvWwg1oXwpdrM2zq_WlUI2C=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had a small soffit repair job. I followed up with them after four weeks, I was told that it would be scheduled the following week and then I never heard back from them.

Three months later my soffit is still unrepaired and Roofix abandoned the contract. I get that it is a small job, but if they have no interest in fixing it, they shouldn't provide a quote or request a job authorization signature.

Poorly managed business and customer service.","Images":null,"When":""}]

They did a great job and I would highly recommend them!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carl Lum","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSRGuPwov4aPPoD_HaL4gsNcSZ8Vex25vT77JrFGm3yqyxX-d5KA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I chose Cooper Roofing because they impressed us with detailed estimates, helpful staff, and top notch professionalism. Sebastian did a great job of describing the work and made us feel reassured. Their workers were quick and friendly, and Volkan was very knowledgeable and helpful.

When the job was done, the final inspection report was detailed and provided lots of photos and overhead drone shots. We are satisfied that we have a quality roof that'll last many years (if not the rest of our lives). I will add that Cooper was actually the highest price of all our estimates, but we still feel we got good value for the money.

One caveat though: Cooper takes no responsibility for interior damage and they state that right in their contract. We had our skylight replaced and the new skylight removed the old interior trimming, leaving some bare wood and gaps exposed. When we asked Cooper if they could add a decorative strip to cover these gaps, we were surprised that they told us to go find a drywall contractor to finish the job! This after the thousands of $$$ of business we gave them. We also received conflicting reasons why they didn't include the trim.

However after some negotiating, we arrived at a solution satisfactory to both parties, even though it wasn't 100% what we expected. Thank you guys.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sean Butler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIB_KFjDwvwNYoNMbohEWZLo7UhCEz9sRF3mcJvD6pDryU6kA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly Recommended!

The management and technical team demonstrated their professionalism by paying attention to the details throughout the project. It was a difficult task since the unit was fully furnished. I must say my condo looks better than the original purchased from the developer after the restoration. Congrats to the job well done. Thank you.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrea Fryett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUt64waRkVRoYiharM1KcOnZh6yH37HFVzGFMRCwpFWkKLyH4Cy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This has been the worst experience, I actually feel scammed out of 250$

First I contacted them because we have mould or algae growing in our toilet tank that we have uncessesfully been able to treat with bleach products.

I called and made an appointment but on they say they were to come I had had no news or follow-up so I called.  They had to reschedule, apartheid they forgot about me.  The print manager was pressuring me to pay 250$ to send a consultant for what I thought would be an assessment of our situation.  As they already had a no show I agreed only to pay them when the technician was at my property.  Already alarm bells are going off.
The gentleman came and just measured our place and left and then sent a quote by email.
I have no more information or understanding of my mold situation or any kind of clear understanding of what they are actually planning to do to try to treat the issue.
I literally have zero idea what I paid 250$ for.
Then, no follow up by the company so I reached out again and they said "we can do it for x amount but not before the end of November.  I paid the 250$ in September.  That's 3 months later.  I am zero priority for them, despite having already handed over a sizable amount of money.
Every other company I've worked with (professional painters, carpet installers etc) come to your property to assess the job and provide a plan of action free of charge.  When they leave you understand exactly what they will do, how much it will cost and understand the plan, process, challenges and costs.  They then follow up and make an appointment to actually complete the work.  At this point you pay a deposit and then you pay the balance when the job is done.
Honestly, 250$ money grab here by a company who does not care about their clients and does not deliver.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steve Chang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL9D8wL0DKLzyYVQupnZdHuEmuQcrapG2_yhepwzCIsIYqvyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a flood in my apartment and all my communication was with Daniel (project manager) as well as Jose. Both were extremely helpful, responsive and always willing to discuss any concerns or issues with my water damaged apartment. Daniel was great in communications/coordination with all the trades, removal & replacement of my damaged appliances and I never had to second guess or get involved with any aspect of the renovation except choose the color of the paint and flooring 😊. Jose was also extremely helpful and willing to assist with anything or rescheduling a meeting time at the last moment. I highly recommend this company and if possible, ask to work with Daniel and/or Jose as they will ensure the job gets done properly/in a timely matter.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Diel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEI5wZxDwZEfpRDkDWMCqz0iClvFw28-E2BhQF4OBqWCzT0Std=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing work - fast, clean, and super professional. Ray was extremely nice and very considerate of our place and our situation. The price was extremely competitive and definitely worth it. I'm extremely happy.

Shout out to project manager Amy who took customer service and satisfaction to a new level by listening to my needs, adapting and working with me to provide the best possible way of removing the mold behind the kitchen counters while still leaving the kitchen in operation. I haven't met a better customer liaison and organizer yet.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jonathan Graham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK54raeFLGNqqOEXP589n3kdOXyNnB30U3kUFD18d5TA2rK5w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"PuroClean was fantastic. Todd's advice about which projects  I should tackle first in order to avoid moisture in the basement were correct.

I highly recommend this company","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Olga A.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-nzsMRQBwDglYKxPa0gc7-yZiZsq6ZI_IPaLyV4t0VoekBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Many years ago, we had our roof installed by Interlock Roofing Company, which came with a lifetime warranty. The roof served us well, but over the last couple of years the paint began to peel and it became quite unsightly. We contacted Interlock to request a replacement. I have to admit, it took some time and a few follow-up emails and phone calls, but eventually our case was passed to Todd — and thanks to him, our problem was fully resolved.
Todd arranged for the best installer, Danny, to handle our roof, and I don’t have enough words to describe how exceptional he is. Not only is Danny extremely knowledgeable and professional, but he is also a true perfectionist who pays attention to every detail. Our roof looks beautiful again thanks to both Todd and Danny.
We truly appreciate their dedication and the quality of their work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Izuka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLBJthSsWg9EtR7rCCCUj0moZ7ck_z-_a6Sp8g5sCCsyKR7nA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I debated for some time as whether or not to replace our aging roof with a metal roof or go with the standard asphalt shingles.  We’re so happy we decided to go with the metal roof as it turned out better than our expectations and doesn’t take away from the contemporary house style.  We appreciated that the original meet and greet started with the estimate right up front and then led into the details of the roof color choices., etc.  The roofers were hard working and professional and did a great job of cleaning up the yard daily.  We highly recommend this company!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo_L2h-AE&fid=0x0:0x33603de0ccfe3ecd"],"When":"2025-4-23"},{"Name":"Kenneth Leung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKYHVgTkUVe5XJcvBq-H8zVU4p_Sd-D0g3_NJKYAc4sL-iqzw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Extremely satisfied with the whole process. Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob Cunningham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRdJyAKQzk3cJBUNO_cN6XdNEQMWpM-UeCc5rEZLnjWTrvNJLi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the time I made the decision, to select Interlock as the successful roofing company, I have been extremely  satisfied.  The customer service has need excellent, regardless of whether it was administration, schedulers or the sale representative.

The 4-5 man crew worked hard and long hours, under very hot conditions.  Under the supervision of Antonio, a man with extensive experience and thoroughness, the project advanced quickly. One thing that demonstrated this was the focus on keeping the site clean and free of materials and nails and fasteners.

Upon completion, my neighbours were echoing my own observation; if a roof could be beautiful, this one met that standard.  People walking the public trail, have stopped to take pictures, and ask questions.

👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Axiana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqj3YTC5yDIlMxFeAf2d34mGsnjatPg0jVpv457fFRfp335NCW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I bought a house with an interlock roof installed, it was a huge selling point of the house, unfotunately the seller did not tell me (possibly they did not know) that the warranty needed to be transfered (I mean seriously, the roof was installed on the house, not their backs), my "life time" roof started leaking, I contacted Interlock for assistance and they asked me if I transfered the warranty within 60 days, and I advised them that I had no idea that I had to. I told them that I would be willing to pay the transfer fee. And they refused. The reason you ask.... Because they cannot prove that I did not modify the roof. Seriouly! So I asked, how could you prove that the original owner did not modify the roof if you do not come out to inspect it, they had no answer for this.

They use a loophole not to back their product that they swear is a lifetime product!

Do not buy Interlock, it is way over priced. I am now installing shingles that have a 50 year Labor and Product warranty that is warrantied to the RESIDENT not the Owner! They are called Mystique shingles and are produced in Alberta, I am certain any roofer in the Canada can obtain them, and they are beautiful!

*In response to the owner below, the product warranty is by Interlock brand not the installer so it does not matter where it was installed, the product itself is horrible. The roofer below may be wonderful, but the product Interlock itself is garbage. But just to clarify, this owner did nothing wrong. My home is in Alberta, it is the Interlock Company themselves that I have a problem with*","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ8fuGcQ&fid=0x0:0x33603de0ccfe3ecd"],"When":"2023-6-29"},{"Name":"Paul Liversidge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFGDkvyDENScd31cVlAybdX3ll9PQ3gLVtsQEUcoCAdU7DG2sL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had the black shingle installed. It's a great finish, very clean and smooth, modern, and a vast improvement over the old cedar roof with curled shingles and other broken pieces. The installation guys toiled through some long hot days, even working on Saturday to keep the job on time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICqn-XuLA&fid=0x0:0x33603de0ccfe3ecd"],"When":"2021-6-23"},{"Name":"Marianna Makara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLU0VUUVZPhi_1yrhLlrMmHLtD7zXHTHYCPcfitQtTX25E_dw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"19 years ago we had Interlock install a Mediterranean styled metal roof to replace an aging cedar shake roof and it has been performing great.  Last year we covered 2 of our sun decks with tempered glass structures and found that sliding snow posed a danger of breaking the glass and causing costly repairs.  We chose Interlock to install snow rails, not just in the areas prone to sliding snow causing damage, but on all other sections where sliding snow could injure anyone walking on the surrounding paved walkways.  The Interlock installer, Tariq, installed the snow rails this past fall just in time to prevent snow from crashing on our glass sun deck covers and also prevent snow from crashing on cars parked just in front of our garages.
Tariq performed the install efficiently and was pleasant to deal with.  Well done!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDmtfPpmwE&fid=0x0:0x33603de0ccfe3ecd"],"When":"2022-2-4"},{"Name":"Guillermo Schwarz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6IG6Fg400TbW1Sf4QbXuJI65ymmtxLbPWDPF-2F3RBONKVg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After months of extensive research and due diligence, I chose Interlock to install my new roof. I have no doubts that I made the best decision, as now I have the best product in the market with lifetime warranty, fairly priced, installed by the best and with an unbeatable curb appeal... period.
The competitors (not really competitors) do not come even close with product offerings, price and most importantly, seriousness, which I consider essential in a project of this magnitude. The whole process was very smooth and professional, from the first contact with the sales team member, then with the technical consultant that showed  great interest and patience to answer all my questions during several sessions. He also shared photos of their training facility, provided very detailed information about the techniques, the materials and the various proprietary flashing profiles they use in their roof installations.
The installation crew was very professional, clean, respectful and needless to say, very qualified, extremely meticulous and careful. At the end of every single day, they cleaned up everything without leaving any mess behind, as if the lived here. My wife and I were very pleased with that, as they really made an effort to minimize disruptions.
I can confidently recommend Interlock with my eyes closed, especially after researching and talking to ten other roofing companies. Nobody comes close.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDq2PjTngE&fid=0x0:0x33603de0ccfe3ecd"],"When":"2021-6-27"}]

I had one panel that was broken in half but he was able to reuse and secure it in place for me so I didn't need to pay for a replacement.

I also asked him about possibly doing some work on my gutters in the future. He was very knowledgeable and explained potential solutions as well and pros and cons. What I love is that he didn't rush me into making any decisions which is what I've experienced with other roofing/gutter companies.

He was a pleasure to deal with and very reasonable with his pricing. Absolutely would recommend his services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Aikenhead","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWn-UC64irU_bewF3VtioNKAH1Y3VGsj3nUobFqCX0k5EYiHnft=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently hired Iouri Baltchougov to work on the roof and gutters of our home in North Burnaby. The house is 110 years old, 4 storeys high, with a roof so steep that when we replaced the shingles 25 years ago, the first 4 companies we approached wanted nothing to do with working up there. Iouri, however, is a diehard mountaineer who seems more comfortable at the top of a 40-foot ladder than down on the ground. He was the perfect guy for the job.

We needed the asphalt shingles cleaned of moss and sediment, several sections of downpipe removed or repaired, gutters washed and cleaned, and all the windows washed. Iouri did everything thoroughly and conscientiously. Wearing his safety harness, he spent many hours scraping the entire roof by hand. The old gutters were all scrubbed clean. A couple of downpipes had become completely clogged with sand and grit from the shingles. He swapped them for new ones, including a tricky section that angled around a corner.

Although it can sometimes take Iouri a while between visits to show up again, he works diligently and efficiently, cleaning up after each session. He knows his craft well and is happy to take on additional tasks, whether painting a pipe or re-installing a gutter to the proper angle. His pricing is fair and his terms are reasonable. Although he tells you everything that requires servicing, there’s no up-selling or inflating the to-do list. He’s also very friendly and trustworthy.

I can easily recommend Adequate Solutions for any home services that require long ladders and lots of experience. I expect to hire Iouri again someday.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJ3O_oxQE&fid=0x0:0x3adad2c81796c918"],"When":"2023-7-12"},{"Name":"Andrea Wiebe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6rdQ__gZTLUzl1og-XW9Qu6ynpmrVxhPkoH8Fhe_OmSfB_w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I thought we'd need our gutters completely replaced but Iouri was able to use most of the existing lengths and just replace certain areas. Iouri was very hardworking and not only checked in with us when an unexpected problem arose, he also asked us to look everything over at the end of the job to make sure we were happy with everything. Our gutters look/function a million times better, and our house is much cleaner now too!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ken","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK1MJSHVgYivXcSEgYCW7Nw4_tYMvpcLFTMHyB1QwKNgU2Lag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yuri installed a new drain with filtration box to our gutter because of an overflow of water from it. I highly recommend anyone who is considering powerwash your house to call up Adequate Solutions.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nikolas Bruel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLmmgQRHryr87geSW_2WVscEg-qa_PjRp9eiVgGT5qbBynypw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"3 years ago we bought a house that was serviced by Adequate Solutions. Adequate Solutions where notified about the sale and they offered us to keep their system when we take over the house. We agreed, as previous owner told us that he is very happy with the services he received from them. And for next 2 years we never had any problems with water going over the top of the gutters. Last year money was tight, so we decided that we can save on gutter cleaning and ask Adequate Solutions to remove their system. As we were told, that there is no long term commitment. Adequate Solutions did come and remove their system. It was a very big mistake. After the system was removed, in a month our gutters got plugged with leaves and water started to go over the top to our balcony and started to drip from the ceiling in the bedroom below. Who knew that the reason that we didn't have any problems was that gutter protection system? We spent more money to fix it than we would spend in 10 years with Adequate Solutions for their system. From now on we would never leave. Thank you for your great service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brent Eastwood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWE454ntvouxruF6x22VCy8mY0S2yGxnzO0b3z1aeQuRuCghq08=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yuri was great! Careful once you pay these guys, you will never hear from them again if any issues arise.  My parents needed some minor updates done to their tar and gravel roof.  No leaks to fix but a few things needed updating to get a little more life out of it.  All seemed good when Wally showed up and did an assessment.  Working with any roof without replacing the entire roof has its risks, I get it.  That said, after their work my parents are out 8K with water pouring through the door jam to the bathroom entrance making it a dangerous situation especially for elderly parents.   They did come back and found an area they thought looked like they missed.  It unfortunately didn't mitigate the incoming water.   I sent emails and the last reply was that Wally the owner would get back to me.  Nothing.  I ended up tarping the roof (in photo) until I can get another company to come.   Great marketing online and they did a decent job adding the new drain spouts but when it comes to customer service this business feels like a fly by night. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sam S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQedvwi8s1oXZO-sdtjchsl2T12_o71SBtiIOIbDbpBdNZbA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yesterday I called up Cedar Grove and asked them if they could do a custom flashing for me approximately 30 ft. It was imperative that they get the flashing that day. Unlike other fabricators who couldn't accommodate me cedar Grove was very pleasant and said "yes we can do this for you please come down in an hour and pick up your order."

I drove 45 minutes and picked up my flashing. When they brought it out to my vehicle it was very sunny and the flashing looked like it was the color I had ordered. I've been very specific so I didn't think there was a reason they would screw it up. Regardless I got back to my job site and realized it was the wrong color by then it was 1:30 p.m. I called up cedar Grove and formed them what happened and they quickly responded back and admitted fault. Somebody had mislabeled the flashing and they've given me the wrong color and they didn't have the correct flashing that I wanted at the Burnaby branch. I told the manager Brent it was imperative I get the flashing immediately before 7:30 the next morning cuz I had a crew showing up to do work based on that flashing being installed. I also told them that I wasn't about to waste another 2 and 1/2 hours of my time to come back there and pick it up since it wasn't my screw up. Brent called up the Surrey branch and promised that I would have the flashing delivered to me by 7:30 a.m. the next morning. Surprisingly true to his word the flashing was delivered to my job site at 7:15 a.m.

The flashing cost me $41.35 including taxes. there was no money to be made on this flashing and Brent the manager at Cedar Grove went above and beyond to please a customer and own his mistake. This is unheard of in today's cutthroat world.

To deliver this flashing from Surrey to downtown Vancouver probably cost them anywhere from $50 to $120 on a $41 product. This this type of customer service is unheard of in this day and age!

Generally somebody would say the best I can do is refund you your money but if you want more flashing you have to come pick it up.

For the incredible service that was provided to me the manager of Cedar Grove Brent gets an A+

For screwing up my flashing and giving me the wrong color the staff in the metal shop at Cedar Grove get a B minus

For not checking the product before leaving the supplier I as a customer get a D. I will never do that again plus this five-star review is not about me it is about Brent the manager at Cedar Grove and Cedar Grove as a company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joey Heilman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJoz1sNCSt08obEPCF2KTz8KJhSXRm4KUaupMlnFxpZjZu1yR0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went in to the warehouse at Cedar Grove this morning and have never seen a more organized supplier. The guy at the front desk said chuck is responsible for it being that way. I'd suggest that Chuck deserves a pat on the back and a raise :-). Well done Ceder Grove!  -Joe Heilman","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cedar Roofs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXH3ml3DlI_pDDmlNFeEM-AtFUErd9VfO0DCCZaEAqVeQEoGYc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Not friendly. Roy Dennis Roofing came through when my original roofer couldn’t.

3 months waiting for my original roofer and my wife was done. The company needed 5 dry days to install a torch-on roof. 5 dry days during Vancouver’s rainy season is next to impossible.

Called Shayne at RDR and his crew of 7 had my roof done in 3 days. Shayne turned mission impossible to mission possible.

RDR crew was friendly, professional and efficient. Should have listened to my wife and went with RDR in the first place. #WifeKnowsBest.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICKyYWg3QE&fid=0x0:0xf9387d7c566d2abe"],"When":"2021-4-10"},{"Name":"My Name","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL10TBn4hCGJ8DVNg-Jv5wa7fOxd-u-XW0VSekQ-FRMkCCiXw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Previously I had Roy Dennis Roofing replace my roof with a torch on.  This was nearly 15 years ago and it still is in good shape.
This time my sundeck had a water leak which was causing  the water to leak  to my garage and land on the hood of my classic car.

- The owner, John, is honest, compassionate, and takes real pride in the quality of his workmanship.

- He treats his team with respect, and you can see that motivation reflected in the great work they do.

- Before giving a quote, John personally inspects your roof—unlike salespeople who rely only on satellite images and miss important details.

- His pricing is fair, and he uses top-quality shingles, underlay, and materials.

- He doesn’t cut corners—he replaces all old metal instead of re-using it.

- He even adds extra roof vents (without you having to ask), showing his commitment to doing the job right.

- Communication is excellent—you get daily updates with photos so you always know what’s happening.

- Cleanup is thorough and leaves no mess behind.

- Best of all, the warranty is transferable to a future homeowner if you ever sell your house.

I learned the hard way that not all roofers are the same. A couple of years ago, I used a large roofing company, Penxxxxx, and was completely disappointed. Did I not say it all here? Then they chose a sunny week to do my roof and it was awesome . Love the work. Left the work site clean. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kathleen Maslin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLNwzOn6Nugm0f94s_cKbEcXaxzpndl0x8GNXRWQuLrmAJfvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I called Alpha Nova roofing, because of their wonderful google reviews. I left a voicemail & got a call back very quickly. After explaining our water issues, she said she would have someone call to discuss if they could help us. That same day, Youssef called & spoke with my husband. He said he would need to come out & take a look. Youssef came last Friday…went up on the roof & found the main problem as well as some problem areas. When I asked when they could come back to fix it, he said they would make the job a priority and call me this week to fit us in their schedule … hopefully in the next 2 weeks. Sunday night ( 2 days later) Youssef texted asking if they could come the holiday Monday (today) to get the roof fixed, and they did!! Youssef came himself, and brought a partner…and they worked all afternoon. From their quick response times to their communication style, we were very impressed. He explained everything, taking videos & pictures so we could see the problem before & after. Their customer service is excellent. I highly recommend Youssef & Alpha Nova Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"nikki lule","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmgTezgnHcOC9Lo-GS7UYiXi4fo246edOoDmyyQ2OMCFgNmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent company!!! They are very personable and professional, told us what they think and no pressure into purchasing.  I honestly didn’t think that you would be able to see a difference in a roof but it looks beautiful! I highly recommend using them, a great, kind, fast, hardworking team!  They even cleaned out our gutters and made sure there was no moisture in the attic! And I never ever thought I would say that about a roofing company in my life. These guys are top notch, and you cannot go wrong using them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Corey Marchant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXy2oZsQUyieA10BKex_jCfWzSAh-OgXesl1p0A2EHjFAxjGBk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had AlphaNova Roofing come in and do a quote on replacing our roof as we had some leaks from the old roof and it had reached the end of its life.

There was a bit of an error with the initial quote as the address we supplied did not show our actual house with the Sat images they use for estimating the quote. Once they arrived they were able to give a quote for our actual place very quickly on the spot and we didn't have to wait any additional time. Ibrahim's ability to adjust on the fly is amazing. Ibrahim was apologetic, though it was due to no fault of his own. We were given a few different options and settled on the best one for us. Price was on point and covered not only the new roof, but brand new gutters as well.

The work was started by Ibrahim's crew quickly after the deposit was paid. The work was done safely and professionally. The crew were courteous and polite, and they kept the mess from roofing down to a minimum. I couldn't be more happier with the stellar work that was performed.

I would have no problems recommending AlphaNova Roofing to anyone for their roofing needs","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICrgLGafA&fid=0x0:0x9f5ccae56d2f9bd4"],"When":"2024-7-2"},{"Name":"Kasun de Silva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhTiJQ8WN1W8Cyf_2oWMGnYUGQI6D-qcZUWVx9yXBKZdD8xQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I contacted AlphaNova roofing about a roof leak I had. I was also given multiple quotes at my request for different repair options. The scheduled roof repair was done within the time promised an at the quoted price. I was also provided with repair pictures. I can say that I’m extremely happy with the service AlphaNova provided. I will definitely be using them for all my roofing needs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC957X5lQE&fid=0x0:0x9f5ccae56d2f9bd4"],"When":"2024-3-10"},{"Name":"Jon Macfarlane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJWkUUtLC8YDZzQqsqc2MzOFd2XK_udc13AJboRN_ijsgSoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Alphanova Roofing was fantastic. We recently had our roof and fascia replaced. We were blown away by the outstanding service. All the employees with this company are amazing!! Making the decision to contract with Alphanova was easy given their superb customer service. Youssef and Ibrahim really go above and beyond making sure that you understand and feel comfortable with the decision and really take the time to explain the process and all options available. Overall, we were impressed with everything they did. Definitely recommend Alphanova Roofing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDL7ImYHA&fid=0x0:0x9f5ccae56d2f9bd4"],"When":"2024-6-26"},{"Name":"Vic Mina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZa4IcbztlhoSgWvnH4Z4WdFQi8z-6f4sr6Yu3OZfmjgYjOZyg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Alphanova roofing is a professional Team. [{"Name":"Bubba Mclovin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQdLep4wJhPchhwGHwmCOK5R5WJNwc7_29CIDZJ9P8f0AEYg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was a pleasure dealing with Yvon and his son, Cody, during the installation of the new metal roof on my home.

From the outset, I felt they took the time to carefully assess and analyze the unique needs of my roof. Their thoughtful approach and attention to detail gave me complete confidence in the process and the final result.
Yvon and Cody are professional, knowledgeable, and personable. They communicated clearly and consistently throughout the project, ensuring I felt informed every step of the way. Cody provided daily progress updates, complete with photographs, which I greatly appreciated. They were always available to answer my questions and address any concerns promptly.

Their installation team was equally impressive — hardworking, courteous, and highly professional. They cleaned the yard thoroughly at the end of each day, and it was clear that every member of the team took genuine pride in their workmanship.

Overall, it was truly a refreshing experience working with Yvon and Cody. I highly recommend this family-owned company for their exceptional quality, professionalism, and customer care. They rock!

Chris Matus","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bill Brass","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVempNwTFfOjgebFoKAlJbvzL13_K2ZJdduZr1531HhwzzzGzE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After seeing several advertisements for Valley Metal Roofing, we decided to given them a call and get a quote. We decided to go ahead with our main roof and hot tub gazebo.The work has just been completed and it has exceeded our expectations.
Cody and his crew were meticulous in their attention to detail and every day, before they left, they did a great clean up job. The guys were polite and friendly. We can highly recommend this company.
Thanks again Valley Metal Roofing!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJux9avOn4SxpwE&fid=0x0:0x4a51c2152fc67703"],"When":"2025-5-6"},{"Name":"Trevor Hopton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0xjkcJe_1BaYrGWeQwvqSby9pYCcIzUykbAJt6siBKpxwoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"To begin I must say I have never experienced such a high level of professionalism and customer service than I have with Valley Metal. Stephanie","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mia Arisaema","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIvrj37LPK2Xt6fUpyUovGEOd-5AptQX6ZYqsz46kM-v9n-A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I hired Matthew to work with me on renovation of my newly acquired, tiny condo in Kits. I had a relatively tiny budget for my fertile imagination, so it was a challenging job. Here are a few highlights that might be interesting to others looking to hire a contractor:

1. Trust. I found Matthew, his employees and sub-trades to be entirely trustworthy. They did what they promised. They kept me informed and found solutions. Without fail.

2. Quality. These guys do good work. Finishing is where it counts in my view. One example is Peter’s elegant surgery on prebuilt units to fit around plumbing, and into available space. I use these components every day and am so grateful that they look great and work beautifully. Jackie’s practical experience and encouragement helped me accept the possibilities of prebuilt over custom (which my budget would not allow).

3. Humour. This may seem like an odd comment, but, for me, being able to laugh together means there is common understanding. I wanted my contractor to understand me and my  vision for my home. Matthew, Peter, Jackie and the crew all shared a lovely sense of humour about the sometimes stressful reno experience, and that gave me confidence that we were all working toward the same goals. That’s important regardless of size of budget. Everyone wants to spend wisely, right?

On reflection, I am delighted with the work Sasen did for me and have no hesitation recommending them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephanie Colpitts","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJaWud4Yo-Y0oMlwSiQ8iU2uHQ49RlTLNGvf2NgmX4T1KrcOg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sasen Homes is 10/10 for craftsmanship, and customer service. At first, I was a bit disappointed that Brock didn't come out when we called (because most of the reviews referred to him), but Tyler was extremely professional and took great care with his work.  We are really glad he was assigned to us as he is a pleasure to deal with.

He fixed the leak we had, and then advised us what work needed to be done to prevent future issues from arising.  We never felt pressured or like he was trying to make us spend unncessarily but that he sincerely wanted to help us maintain and extend the life of our roof as much as possible before having to replace it or encounter major issues.

We took our time thinking about it and had the suggested work done in September 2020 to prepare for the rainy season.  We should have done it right away as there was a small wait once the busy roofing season hit over the summer, but Tyler kept us updated as to where we were in the queue and we love the extra care and attention he provided.  He even removed some chicken bones that crows had carried onto our roof and caulked a small area of our gutter that was leaking.  Those were small things, but I appreciate how he treated the area like it was his own and didn't just ignore the garbage on the roof or just brush it off the side nor wait until we had a more serious issue with the leaking gutter.

It's clear he cares about his work and reputation.  I will definately continue to call Tyler at Best West Roofing for any issues that come up with our roof in the future as well as recommend them to family and friends.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"George Merry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIi4XpK3S9Ix7EflHNTM2GuwsT7bsWws7KhPmUwjBLxO68_wA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From initial contact to completion our re-roofing project was superbly handled. The cost was reasonable. When the rain finally stopped Kizi came and did the work. She almost finished a day ahead of schedule. The work was beautifully done and even to my untrained eye it looked way better than before. The work was all done according to plan and as quoted with no extra unexpected costs. It has since rained heavily and no leaks. Excellent experience with Absolute Roofing in all aspects.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUejLwUESFIc51SMO71vCd2e5X2atz1fDtUY4Ca4Txc9dOlNqMqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Got my roof replaced last week. I was a little nervous as this was the first major update I have done on my home and I was worried it would be complicated and disruptive. But I was pleasantly surprised how easy and quick the process was. David was professional, efficient and quick to respond to my messages and provided excellent communication throughout the job. The bulk of the work was done in just 2 days and I am very happy with the final results. Thank you again to the team that worked on my home!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBcrsq_mQ-4YtFYRLC17ulb&fid=0x0:0x21815f533f6620ac"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Isamu Fujiwara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_4Og65TP38R2TPhUnlx88HafR78I2GSmw-C7FC7jNI1qSPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently noticed a bulge on my ceiling that looked like possible water damage and was worried there might be a roof leak. I called to request an inspection of both the roof and attic, and from the very first interaction, the experience was excellent. The person who answered the phone was friendly, listened carefully to my concerns, and was able to schedule an appointment the very same day. I also appreciated receiving an upfront estimate before any work began.

Will and his assistant arrived right on time and were both professional and courteous. They took great care inside the house, making sure carpets stayed clean and placing rags before entering the attic. They thoroughly inspected the attic, took photos, and clearly explained their findings. Thankfully, there was no issue with the roof, which was very reassuring.

What really impressed me was that they went above and beyond the scope of the roof inspection. Instead of stopping there, they investigated further and discovered the true source of the moisture — an HVAC pipe that wasn’t properly sealed to the diffuser. They could have simply said the roof was fine and left it at that, but they took the extra step to find the real cause.

I was extremely impressed with their honesty, professionalism, and attention to detail. Highly recommend this company!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Wallace MacKay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXi0gLdsP6SQdWEGFytwUu-l4jWVL0gsHnGlVFQdkMDMolU8T34=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kizi Melo (an Absolute Roof Solutions technican) restored 2 decks, both getting older and weathered, in our Kitsilano duplex. She provided excellent service, very competent workmanship, detailed in ensuring that all torchon membranes were fully restored. The decks look new again, and I'll sleep better knowing the roof decks are well maintained.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC14fI5SrxId2YjDGhINnyw&fid=0x0:0x21815f533f6620ac"],"When":"2025-9-19"},{"Name":"Michael L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJWmVa5clHn0Ehod5yiVD866mCxGgm6tp-oWguDG5g7OzGJAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"During solar panel installation, the technician advised the plywood was very wet along one side of the roof.  The roof was only 12 yrs old.  They took and provided photos.  The solar panel installation was halted. I contacted several roofing companies to get assessments on the issue and obtain estimates.  It turns out one side of the roof did not have adequate venting and moisture was being absorbed by the plywood.  I met with several roofing company representatives and each provided their suggested way to address the issue...and the estimated costs were all over the map. But when I met with the Absolute Roof Solutions sales representative...I knew I had found the right company.  They explained what the issue was, how they would address it and the next steps.  They followed with a quote and then a follow up conversation with the Project Manager.  They picked a date that was to be rain free.  The crew showed up on time and they went about their work.  Taking 1/2 a roof is not an easy task but they managed to get it done in the one day...and to get the site all cleaned after, including ensuring all debris was removed from both neighbours yards.  Great job Absolute Roof Solutions.  It was a very positive roof repair/replacement experience and very happy to recommend Absolute Roof Solutions.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Clayton Gates","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWo34GpVM8Q-hHRq1VIZ2mXz-vYQxCuXxrC9vO7avwfCDq-dDc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After contacting several companies to quote on a new roof for my families first house in Vancouver we decided to go with Absolute. Not because they were the least expensive but they did a thorough inspection, showed us problems other companies didn’t find and provided detailed scope of work in their quote where we felt confident it was an all in quote. No surprises would come up during the project and we would be extremely happy with the final product. I didn’t want to take a chance on my first home and they were by far the most professional quote we received and didn’t want to take chances with a cheaper “new roof for $xx quote, unsure of what a “new roof” meant to this company vs our expectations. Will update when project is complete","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Uma Yogendrakumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfitmQGgemb1Ff97hTdcn0n6ocIFc3rQ_TE2y8b0rrtoC7SQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our roof was replaced last week.  Quite surprisingly the replacement was done in two days time.  They are well organized and very efficient.  The project manager David and Michael were very helpful and answered all queries with clarity before and after the installation. Cleaning around the property was well done.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Eoin Brennan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuU7yPDhqTm-J2ZD9jnjMTr8PkrfzMm_qakEf93l7W7DPjEGB8pw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Top quality craftsmanship by an friendly and competent team.

The affect a new roof has on the curb appeal of your house is enormous, not to mention the comfort you gain knowing that everything is watertight for the oncoming winter - you need the installation done right.   Doug, Rada and team were awesome from beginning to end - from clear details of what was being installed in the quote to how they protected the rest of the house and deck during demolition and installation - they went the extra mile.

They easily dealt with some curveballs we threw to them too. They removed our leaky (and now unused) chimneys above the roofline, giving the home a much cleaner look and installed snow guards.

Doug took time to work through a water egress issue that was not related to the roof installation - including helping me cut drywall open! - determined to find a solution the issue. Which we did.
We also required some more specialized carpentry work. Doug leveraged his own network to get us somebody to complete it.

It's not easy to find a company that that you can trust with such competitive pricing and such high quality craftsmanship on such a project. I feel fortunate to have worked with Doug, Rada and the team at Eco Exteriors.

The metal roof has really given the home a transformative look. And the new gutters were really the cherry on top. My photographs attached don't truly show how transformative it is.

A great team and great company!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDxspgriABMH3NDDwk-qvIV&fid=0x0:0x7b7cd1189f5accac"],"When":"2025-11-7"},{"Name":"James Troutman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLHJ3OXj5p6JZGAFkgYc6VJa_mmbbj0UHVtGNFtmstHXCIXyg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Having had Eco Exteriors Roofing and Solar complete a few of my projects i am happy to recommend them to others.
